description: Add turnkey components to React Native SDK and convert mobile demo app to real consumer flow

stories.title: Create Avatar component for video fallback
flow: Props: name (string), size (number, optional), style (ViewStyle, optional)
Renders circular View with initials extracted from name
Background color derived deterministically from name string hash
Text color white, centered, system font

stories.title: Create AudioIndicator component for speaking visualization
flow: Renders 3 vertical bars that animate based on level using react-native-reanimated
Bars green when active, gray when inactive

stories.title: Create StatusBadge component for muted/speaking state
flow: Small circular badge with icon: muted=red mic-off, speaking=green waveform, hand-raised=yellow hand

stories.title: Create ControlBar component with standard meeting controls
flow: Props: onToggleAudio, onToggleVideo, onToggleScreenShare, onToggleChat, onLeave (callbacks)
Props: isAudioEnabled, isVideoEnabled, isScreenSharing, isChatOpen (boolean states)
Horizontal bar with 5 TouchableOpacity buttons: mic, video, screen-share, chat, leave (red)
Active states show filled icons, inactive show outlined
StyleSheet only, no external UI library

stories.title: Create ChatPanel component for bottom sheet
flow: Props: messages (ChatMessage[]), onSend ((text: string) => void), style (optional)
FlatList of messages with sender name, content, timestamp
Local user messages right-aligned blue, others left-aligned gray
Auto-scrolls to bottom on new message, keyboard-aware

stories.title: Create DeviceSelector component for camera/mic picker
flow: Props: devices (MediaDevice[]), selectedId (string), onSelect ((id: string) => void), type ('video' | 'audio')
Modal with list of available devices
Each row shows device name with checkmark if selected
Header: 'Select Camera' or 'Select Microphone' based on type

stories.title: Add bottom-sheet dependency to SDK
flow: bun install from repo root succeeds

stories.title: Create PreJoinLobby turnkey component
flow: Props: onJoin ((displayName: string) => void), roomId (optional string for display)
Uses usePermissions to request camera/mic on mount
Renders: VideoView preview (or Avatar fallback), device selector buttons, displayName TextInput, Join button
Join button disabled until permissions granted AND name entered

stories.title: Create MeetingRoom turnkey component
flow: Uses useParticipants, useMedia, useChat, useScreenShare hooks
Renders: VideoGrid, ControlBar at bottom, ChatPanel in BottomSheet
ScreenShareView shown prominently when screen share active

stories.title: Create VideoConference orchestrator component
flow: Props: roomId (string), displayName (optional string), onLeave (() => void)
lobby → PreJoinLobby, joining → loading + joinRoom(), connected → MeetingRoom, ended → onLeave
Error handling: shows error state with retry option

stories.title: Remove test harness from mobile app
Update root layout for new navigation structure
Create landing page for mobile app
flow: Start Meeting: generate UUID, navigate to /call?roomId=xxx&create=true
Join Meeting: show TextInput for room ID, navigate to /call?roomId=xxx

stories.title: Create call screen using VideoConference
flow: Read roomId and create from useLocalSearchParams
Handle loading state while creating room

stories.title: Verify Start Meeting flow end-to-end
flow: Landing page loads with Start/Join buttons
Enter name, tap Join → MeetingRoom loads

stories.title: Verify Join Meeting flow with two participants
flow: Device 1: Start Meeting, join, note room ID
Device 2: Join Meeting with room ID from Device 1
Both devices show both participants in VideoGrid
Device 1 toggles mute → Device 2 sees indicator
Device 1 sends chat → Device 2 receives it
